---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that's broken or not working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Enter '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Device | e.g. iPhone 15 Pro |
| iOS version | e.g. 17.4 |
| App version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| How installed | TestFlight / App Store / Built from source |

## Additional Context

Is it reproducible every time? Any other context?

---

> For Zakat calculation bugs, please include the exact values you entered.
